notes: Solid pong implementation with proper collision, AI, scoring, and sound; deltaTime cap at 0.016 is oddly low (matches one frame) but game is fully functional and well-structured.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Pong with perfect mechanics, beatable AI, sound effects, and polished game states.
A solid and complete Pong clone with proper scoring, AI, pause, and presentation, but it is not flawless due to simplistic AI, capped timestep behavior, and likely browser audio-policy limitations.
